summary: Bug fix verified for integral classes teacher allocation. When selecting a class with atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral', both regular AND integral curriculum components are now correctly displayed. The 'Nenhum componente curricular disponível' message no longer appears.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in useStaff.js lines 342-349 is correct: Classes with atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral' now set temTurmaRegular=true, allowing both regular and integral components to be shown
The logic properly separates integral classes (which teach regular + integral subjects) from special programs like AEE (which only show AEE components)
seed_data_creation: Created TURMA INTEGRAL TESTE (id: 30e28757-02fa-4b18-96f7-e7052ce913f6) with atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for integral classes teacher allocation verified. Test data: School 'ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA' (220d4022-ec5e-4fb6-86fc-9233112b87b2) has atendimento_integral=true. Class 'TURMA INTEGRAL TESTE' has atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral'. Professor RICLEIDE (4c34fe19-5c6b-4de7-ae9a-030fed52a84c) has lotação in this school. When selecting the integral class in allocation modal, component dropdown shows 9 options including regular (LÍNGUA PORTUGUESA, MATEMÁTICA, etc.) and integral (OFICINA) components.

test_results.bug_description: Ao alocar um professor a uma turma de escola integral (com atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral'), nenhum componente curricular era exibido
test_results.fix_description: Changed logic so that classes with atendimento_programa='atendimento_integral' set temTurmaRegular=true instead of being added to programasTurmas. This allows both regular and integral components to be shown.

verified_scenarios.actual: Shows 9 components: LÍNGUA PORTUGUESA, MATEMÁTICA, CIÊNCIAS, HISTÓRIA, GEOGRAFIA, ARTE, EDUCAÇÃO FÍSICA, ENSINO RELIGIOSO, OFICINA DE LEITURA
Backend test verified - AEE courses filtered correctly

screenshots: .screenshots/final_test.jpg - Shows modal with TURMA INTEGRAL TESTE selected and component dropdown populated
